children.heading: .—Maximum Term of Imprisonment
children.label: a .—Maximum Term of Imprisonment
children.text: The maximum term of imprisonment for a violation of this chapter after a prior sex offense conviction shall be 3 times the term of imprisonment otherwise provided by this chapter, unless section 3559(e) applies.

children.label: A
children.text: under this chapter, chapter 109A, chapter 110, or section 1591; or

children.label: B
children.text: under State law or the Uniform Code of Military Justice for an offense consisting of conduct that would have been an offense under a chapter referred to in subparagraph (A) if the conduct had occurred within the special maritime and territorial jurisdiction of the United States; and
the term “State” means a State of the United States, the District of Columbia, and any commonwealth, territory, or possession of the United States.
